description_long: This is a large rectangular cardboard parcel, sealed with a single strip of beige packing tape running along the top seam. The box features several white adhesive labels, some with barcodes and others with printed text, indicating it is a shipped package. The cardboard surface is a uniform light brown color, with subtle shading and a slightly fibrous texture typical of corrugated material. The labels are placed on different sides, with one side displaying the text 'CAT GIRLS' and another showing a barcode and shipping information. The box appears sturdy and is likely filled with air or lightweight contents, as is common for shipping parcels. Its size and markings suggest it is intended for delivery or storage in an urban environment.
description: A large, light brown cardboard shipping box sealed with beige tape and marked with white shipping labels, including one labeled 'CAT GIRLS'.
description_view_0: The front face shows a plain cardboard surface with a white label and a central strip of beige tape on top.
description_view_1: This side displays a white shipping label with a barcode and text, along with the beige tape on top.
description_view_2: A plain cardboard face with a white label and barcode visible on the top, and the beige tape running along the seam.
description_view_3: This view features a white label with the text 'CAT GIRLS' and another label on the top, with the beige tape visible.
